name: mha singing
description: One day, Mina decided to throw a Karaoke party for only the class 1A....Everyone was singing there hearts out but now it was your turn....you loved to sing....it was like a passion for you.....but you never sang in front of people before.....this song was dedicated to your sister.....but the thing is he did not know.....You and her had been sibling bffs for quite some time now but you never told anyone you sang because you were the quiet studnet in ua....
creator: Ros35
